A women's wellness space · Riyadh

Everything precious
is kept in salt.

A women's wellness space in Riyadh where beauty, health and rest are kept together. Come in; your time is kept for you.

Our story with salt
Scroll to enter
Touch the tapestry — every creature keeps a secret

When did we swap colours for lifeless neutrals?

When did we stop being playful?

And when did rest become something you earn?

At Milh — none of that.

A wellness space, drawn to scale

Step inside, before you arrive.

Every corner of Milh was drawn for one woman at a time — touch a room to see what waits inside.

Touch the rooms — the map answers
The idea

From a grain, a house.

Before it was flavour, salt was the first wealth: it kept food from spoiling, cleansed wounds, and no dish — and no body — is complete without it. Its quiet miracle is that it works unseen — invisible, yet it changes everything. Exactly like real rest.

Most spas whisper the colour out of the room. Milh believes rest can be warm, alive and a little bold — a house for the woman who pours herself out all day, keeping her beauty and health in one ritual.

Purify

Salt draws out what the week left in you — the tension, the noise, the weight you stopped noticing. You leave lighter than you came.

طهارة

Preserve

What matters is packed in salt so it lasts. Here, the thing we protect is you — your softness, your rest, your right to slow down.

حفظ

Season

A pinch brings a flat thing back to life. That is our work too — returning colour, appetite and a little play to days that had gone quiet.

نكهة
The menu · women only

Rituals

Massage, head spa, facials, nails and lashes — book one ritual or compose your own half-day. Prices include VAT.

A small consultation

Tell us how you arrive.

Choose what sounds most like today, answer two more small questions — and we'll compose a programme and an atmosphere to the measure of your day.

3 questions · under a minute · nothing to fill in
The Milh community

More than a space — a company of women.

Salt has always gathered people — so we built a community, free to join: content curated for your calm, your health and your beauty, private invitations to yoga and wellness gatherings around Riyadh, and women worth knowing.

Free
Joining, today and always
For you

Riyadh
Yoga & gatherings, by private invitation

Bread and salt between us — a bond that keeps its people.

Join the community — free
Take Milh home

The apothecary

From our kitchen, by our hands, in small batches: an elixir simmered slowly, an oil pressed cold, and herbs steeped gently — so the ritual follows you home.

The circles

The Salt Circles

The community is free for every woman. The circles are for those who want Milh woven into the month: sessions, gifts, saved preferences and a door that remembers your name.

Now open

Find us in Riyadh.

Our doors are open. Book from the menu or message us, and we'll arrange everything from your time to the atmosphere of your room.

Where
Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
Hours
Sat–Thu · 10am–10pm
Follow

Reserve your quiet hour

Choose from the menu, or simply write to us — we'll hold your time, prepare your room, and set the light, the scent and the sound exactly as you like them.
